name: Nationwide
description: A major UK financial services organization and long-term strategic partner of IBM Consulting. The entity is featured throughout a 17-year partnership timeline detailing extensive digital transformation, banking modernization, and technology scaling initiatives across mortgage, mobile, and core banking domains.

name: Digital Development Centre
description: A dedicated offshore and onshore development hub established to support Nationwide's digital transformation. The centre scaled from an initial team of 100 to over 1,200 members, delivering web, mobile, middleware, and testing capabilities to drive banking modernization.

name: Resiliency Programme
description: A strategic initiative established in 2019 focused on building system resilience and ensuring regulatory compliance. The programme addresses operational stability requirements and supports the broader open banking and API gateway modernization efforts.

name: FirstGen SaaS

2024: MCP Fully Rolled Out, FirstGen SaaS

name: Mobile & Web Development
description: Core engineering capability focused on building and maintaining web and mobile banking applications. This capability enabled the delivery of the New Mobile Bank, Next Generation Banking App, and integrated app store distribution channels.
context: focusing on web, mobile, middleware & testing

name: Data & AI Integration
description: Advanced data processing and artificial intelligence capabilities leveraged to drive banking innovations and modernize legacy systems. This capability supported strategic partnerships and enabled scalable digital service delivery across the client's ecosystem.

Data, AI & partnering in new areas

name: Replatforming & Modernization
description: Technical capability to migrate, replace, and modernize legacy banking infrastructure. This includes the ALAS replatforming, BI ACE migration, and login modernization initiatives designed to improve system performance and user experience.

description: Digital transformation use case focused on streamlining mortgage processes and enabling remote advisory services. The initiative leveraged digital channels to improve customer access and operational efficiency in mortgage lending.

2019: Open Banking Regulatory API Gateway Compliance

name: Mobile Payments & App Store Integration
description: Deployment of mobile payment solutions and app store distribution channels to enhance customer engagement and transaction capabilities. This use case enabled seamless digital payments and expanded the client's mobile banking footprint.

name: Sustained Partnership Growth
description: Long-term strategic value demonstrated by a 17-year partnership with consistent team expansion and project delivery milestones. The sustained growth reflects high client satisfaction, successful delivery track records, and adaptive scaling across multiple technology generations.

name: Operational Efficiency via Offshoring
description: Significant cost and resource optimization achieved through a highly optimized 90% offshoring model. This delivery approach enabled rapid team scaling and accelerated digital transformation without compromising solution quality or compliance standards.

name: Regulatory Compliance Pressure
description: Increasing regulatory requirements around open banking and data security necessitating robust API gateway compliance and resiliency strategies. The client faced mounting pressure to meet strict financial data standards while maintaining seamless customer experiences.

name: Legacy System Modernization
description: Need to replace and modernize outdated banking infrastructure to support digital transformation and improve customer experience. Legacy constraints drove the replatforming of ALAS, BI ACE migration, and login modernization initiatives.

description: Business Automation Workflow platform deployed in 2022 to streamline complex banking processes and improve operational efficiency. The tool enabled automated decisioning and standardized workflow execution across mortgage and core banking operations.

name: Quarterly Release & Milestone Events
description: Key release and milestone events tracking the rollout of automation, metrics, and transformation outcomes, serving as checkpoints for measuring throughput, defect reduction, and portfolio benefits.

name: Automated Execution in SIT
description: The capability to execute software testing in the System Integration Testing (SIT) environment automatically. The document tracks its progression from 0% to 100% automation coverage across multiple phases. This represents a core operational capability delivered to the client.

name: Automated Execution in ST
description: The capability to execute software testing in the System Testing (ST) environment automatically. It achieved unattended execution and reached 100% automation status. This capability directly supports faster release cycles and reduced manual effort.

name: Reduction of Environment Defects
description: A measurable reduction in defects originating from the test environment, dropping from 40% to 3% and stabilizing at 10%. This outcome indicates significantly improved environment stability and testing quality. The reduction directly addresses prior environmental instability.

name: User Story Point Efficiency
aliases: Story Points delivered for Path to Live
description: A significant improvement in development and testing efficiency, reducing estimated story points per user story from 3-5 down to 1. This efficiency gain streamlines the path to production and reduces delivery overhead. The metric reflects optimized team velocity and process maturity.
context: User Points delivered for Path to Live
3-5 Story Points Estimated Per User Story

name: Automation Framework
description: A refactored and strengthened software testing framework used to enable automated execution. It serves as the technical foundation for both SIT and ST automation efforts. The framework also supports advanced use cases like API-driven smoke testing.
context: Refactored and strengthened the automation framework.
Enabled smoke testing with API automation framework.

name: Execution Dashboards & Metrics
description: The introduction of new metrics and execution dashboards designed to provide transparency into testing progress. These tools track automation status and execution performance in real time. They enable data-driven decision making for the delivery teams.
context: Introduced new metrics and execution dashboards for transparency.

name: Critical Test Environment Issues
description: Significant problems and defects within the test environment that required active resolution. These issues previously hindered automation adoption and contributed to high defect rates. Resolving them was a prerequisite for achieving stable automated execution.

name: Synchronized Ways of Working
description: The establishment of consistent, synchronized operational processes embedded across teams. This approach supports broader automation adoption and ensures reliable execution. It represents a key methodological differentiator in the delivery model.
context: Established consistent, synchronized ways of working.

name: Smoke Testing
description: The application of automated API frameworks to perform smoke testing. This use case ensures rapid validation of core system functionality before full execution. It leverages the underlying automation framework for immediate feedback.
context: Enabled smoke testing with API automation framework.
